Constructors

OptimizationOptionsVMAT(int, string)

Perform a user-specified number of VMAT optimization cycles. During the first round, the intermediate dose is calculated after multi-resolution level 3, and the optimization re-starts at multi-resolution level 4. The subsequent rounds calculate first the intermediate dose and start the optimization from multi-resolution level 4.

public OptimizationOptionsVMAT(int numberOfCycles, string mlcId)

Parameters

numberOfCycles int

Number of VMAT optimization cycles.

mlcId string

Identifier for the Multileaf Collimator (MLC).

OptimizationOptionsVMAT(OptimizationIntermediateDoseOption, string)

Perform a single cycle of VMAT optimization. Intermediate dose is optionally calculated after multi-resolution level 3.

public OptimizationOptionsVMAT(OptimizationIntermediateDoseOption intermediateDoseOption, string mlcId)

Parameters

intermediateDoseOption OptimizationIntermediateDoseOption

Intermediate dose option.

mlcId string

Identifier for the Multileaf Collimator (MLC).

OptimizationOptionsVMAT(OptimizationOption, string)

Perform VMAT optimization using a specific starting condition.

public OptimizationOptionsVMAT(OptimizationOption startOption, string mlcId)

Parameters

startOption OptimizationOption

Initial state for the optimizer.

mlcId string

Identifier for the Multileaf Collimator (MLC).

OptimizationOptionsVMAT(OptimizationOption, OptimizationIntermediateDoseOption, int, string)

For the internal use of the Eclipse Scripting API.
